title: A/B Test Judge
instruction: You're running an A/B test. Is this result SIGNIFICANT or just RANDOM noise?

items.text: Version A: 1000 users, 52% clicked. Version B: 1000 users, 48% clicked.
Version A: 10,000 users, 12% bought. Version B: 10,000 users, 8% bought.
Version A: 50 users, 60% liked. Version B: 50 users, 40% liked.
Version A: 100,000 users, 3.1% converted. Version B: 100,000 users, 3.5% converted.
Version A: 20 users, 5 liked. Version B: 20 users, 8 liked.
Version A: 5,000 users, 25% engaged. Version B: 5,000 users, 15% engaged.
Version A tested for 2 hours. Version B tested for 2 weeks.
Both versions tested on 50,000 users for 30 days. B wins by 4%.
